name: checkbox
source_code: // elements/checkbox.html
visual_summary: A checkbox is a small box that can be toggled on or off with a click. It is commonly used for selecting multiple options. Developers would use it when they need to provide users with a binary choice.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics: Name: checkbox Description: A checkbox is a small box that can be toggled on or off with a click. It is commonly used for selecting multiple options. Developers would use it when they need to provide users with a binary choice. Style: minimal Interactions: clickable Tags: selection, toggle, form Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // elements/checkbox.html
